since_last: 39% of 89 AI names green; AI Applications & Data Software leads +0.65%; AI bubble risk 49 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: broad selling, 39% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.01% · BTC -0.66% · Gold +0.97% · Nasdaq100 +0.75%. 39% of 89 AI names are green — broad selling. AI Applications & Data Software is doing the heavy lifting at +0.65%.

cards.headline: AI Applications & Data Software leads, AI Chips & Compute lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Applications & Data Software at +0.65%; weakest is AI Chips & Compute at -2.38%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: MU is the standout at -4.50%
cards.body: Leaders: SYNA +4.00%, PUBM +2.43%, NOW +1.09%, SAP +1.07%, DV +1.01%. Laggards: MU -4.50%, ARM -4.35%, MRVL -3.94%, CEVA -3.89%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -1.28% at $151.04
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -1.28% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 49 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 49/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
